name: USS Strong (ii) (DD 758)
events: 27 Mar 1945 USS Strong (Cdr. C.M. Howe) begins her shakedown off San Diego.
11 May 1945 USS Strong (Cdr. C.M. Howe) completes her shakedown.
31 May 1945 USS Strong (Cdr. C.M. Howe) departed from San Diego bound for Pearl Harbor.
6 Jun 1945 USS Strong (Cdr. C.M. Howe) arrived at Pearl Harbor.
20 Jun 1945 USS Strong (Cdr. C.M. Howe) departed from Pearl Harbor bound for the Marshall Islands.
